meaning.vi: xóa bỏ, loại bỏ, gạch bỏ

to shave (wood, leather, etc.), to sharpen (e.g. pencil), to plane, to whittle, to pare, to scrape off, to erode, to cut down (budget, expenses, staff, time, etc.), to curtail, to reduce, to delete, to erase, to remove, to cross out, to strike out

meaning.en: to shave off (esp. concrete), to take a percentage, to take a cut

meaning.vi: to chip (off), to shave off, to slice off, to cut off, to sharpen, to dampen (one's enthusiasm, interest, etc.), to reduce, to diminish, to weaken, to spoil
meaning.en: to chip (off), to shave off, to slice off, to cut off, to sharpen, to dampen (one's enthusiasm, interest, etc.), to reduce, to diminish, to weaken, to spoil

mnemonic_vi: Lưỡi dao gọt bớt từng lớp, nên nhớ là gọt hay cắt giảm.
